message:
🌱 Add metallb: Replace the MetalLB configmap with k8s custom resources mission (#1011)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "metallb-196-replace-the-metallb-configmap-with-k8s-custom-resources",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "metallb: Replace the MetalLB configmap with k8s custom resources",
+    "description": "Replace the MetalLB configmap with k8s custom resources. Requested by 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current metallb deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your metallb version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n metallb-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb\nhelm list -n metallb-system 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working metallb installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review metallb configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant metallb configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n metallb-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb\nkubectl get configmap -n metallb-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=metallb\n```\nMetalLB currently uses a ConfigMap for its configuration. This is easy, but not very kubernetes-native.\n\nWe should consider migrating the config to custom resource definitions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Replace the MetalLB configmap with k8s custom resources",
+        "description": "This design document discusses implementing MetalLB Custom Resource definition\"CRD\"\nas a mechanism to configure MetalLB's layer2 and BGP features instead of using ConfigMap.\n\nran mdl against the new md file\n```\nmdl 0001-metallb-crd.md \n```\n```yaml\napiVersion: ipcontroller.ext/v1\nkind: IpClaimPool\nmetadata:\n    name: test-pool\nspec:\n    cidr: 192.168.0.248/29\n    ranges:\n        - - 192.168.0.249\n          - 192.168.0.250\n        - - 192.168.0.252\n          - 192.168.0.253\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n metallb-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb\nkubectl get events -n metallb-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Replace the MetalLB configmap with k8s custom resources\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This design document discusses implementing MetalLB Custom Resource definition\"CRD\"\nas a mechanism to configure MetalLB's layer2 and BGP features instead of using ConfigMap.\n\nran mdl against the new md file\n```\nmdl 0001-metallb-crd.md \n```",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: ipcontroller.ext/v1\nkind: IpClaimPool\nmetadata:\n    name: test-pool\nspec:\n    cidr: 192.168.0.248/29\n    ranges:\n        - - 192.168.0.249\n          - 192.168.0.250\n        - - 192.168.0.252\n          - 192.168.0.253",
+        "apiVersion: metallb.universe.tf/v1\nkind: AddressPool\nmetadata:\n  name: my-addr-pool\nspec:\n  protocol: layer2\n  cidr:\n  - 192.168.16.240/30"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "metallb",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "metallb"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Configmap"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/metallb/metallb/issues/196",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/metallb/metallb",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/metallb/metallb/pull/833"
+    },
+    "reactions": 11,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with metallb installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:37:27.532Z",

+}
